taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Python, TypeScript, React, Backend API development, Cloud-native engineering
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, React:1.0, Backend API development:1.0, Cloud-native engineering:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong hands-on production experience building backend systems in Python, Solid proficiency in TypeScript and modern front-end development using React, Experience building and maintaining internal tools, APIs, or product workflows end-to-end, Practical experience with cloud-native engineering, including: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS CDK, Containers/containerization, CI/CD, Hands-on experience building or integrating GenAI systems in real product or internal tooling contexts, Familiarity with one or more of the following: Model serving/inference workflows, Evaluation/monitoring pipelines, Orchestration/workflow systems, RAG pipelines, Agent-style system integrations, Strong software engineering fundamentals, including: Code quality, Testing, Debugging, Performance awareness, Maintainable system design
preferred_quals: Experience building mobile applications or product surfaces for: Android, iOS, React Native, Experience delivering GenAI systems to production or near-production environments, Strong familiarity with orchestration and workflow systems for AI-enabled applications, Experience operating Kubernetes and Terraform in production environments, Experience integrating internal services with: Observability systems, Security systems, Storage systems, Data pipelines, Proficiency in Rust for high-performance or systems-oriented backend development, Strong product instincts and the ability to move fluidly between prototyping and production-minded implementation
core_responsibilities: Design, implement, and maintain backend APIs and internal services using Python, Contribute to service architecture, reliability, and maintainability for internal product workflows, Build integrations with internal and external systems, including data, storage, authentication, and service layers, Where appropriate, contribute to performance-sensitive backend components, with Rust as a plus, Build and maintain user-facing interfaces and internal tools using TypeScript, React, and related modern web technologies, Design and implement polished internal product experiences with strong usability and practical workflow support, Partner on product implementation across desktop and web surfaces, Support or build high-priority mobile product surfaces across Android, iOS, and/or React Native, Help extend internal tooling and workflows into mobile-first experiences where needed, Collaborate on practical mobile UI architecture and implementation decisions
job_summary: Qualitest is a leading AI-powered Quality Engineering Company seeking a Full-Stack/Backend Engineer to join their growing team. The role involves designing, building, and operating backend services and product surfaces that enhance internal tools and AI-driven workflows.
